details.test: Task 1: Reserve indoor table for 4 (adapted date)
Task 2: Buy 2 cheapest qualifying jazz tickets
Task 4: Purchase $75 digital gift card with message
Task 5: Newsletter signup with jazz and rock weekly
Task 6: Choose late-night show between first two jazz events (adapted)
Task 7: Birthday reservation for 6 with birthday package add-on
Task 8: Create loyalty account with preferences
Task 9: Select two vegetarian items under $18 and view cart (adapted)
